channel.title: Seriale Online Movies (unavailable)
channel.description: Last generation attempt failed on 2026-04-27 21:45:51 UTC. Reason: HTML scrape failed: All HTML methods failed for seriale-online-movies: playwright: No items parsed from validated HTML; http: No items parsed from validated HTML; cloudscraper: No items parsed from validated HTML; Native RSS failed: All RSS candidates failed for seriale-online-movies via playwright: Failed to fetch 'https://seriale-online.net/feed/': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='seriale-online.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=20.0); WordPress API failed: All WordPress API candidates failed for seriale-online-movies via playwright: Failed to fetch 'https://seriale-online.net/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=25&_embed=1': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='seriale-online.net', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=20.0)
